# Pos Payment Restriction

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:79e4b3f0d3744c9d857e6ada78008a19c16f3ea4e813413eddde97d9a14f6c97
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

In some situations, one would have user restrictions on payment lines level.

This includes :

- An option to make payment amount readonly
- An option that adds a helper to disable the 'Validate' button (e.g.:
  waiting for an automatic payment transaction to be completed)

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

- Go to Point of Sale
- Go to Configuration / Point of sale and click the PoS you want to configure
- In the Payments section check 'Prefill Cash Payment' and 'Payment amount readonly'

On POS payment screen, the tendered amount cannot be modified
